title: Which ones are the best German subs in your opinion
display_title: Which ones are the best German subs in your opinion
wikitext: []: Which ones are the best German subs in your opinion?             Quote Post by Sertraline » Sat Sep 14, 2024 9:23 am I am currently debating if I should invest in the German DVD set by Leonine to get the official subtitles, because I’ve heard the Netflix version isn’t that accurate. Which are the best German subs in your opinion? Just looking for opinions before I buy anything. I watched the show in Japanese with English subtitles a few times, however, I feel like quite a few things flew over my head, so it would be helpful to watch it in German once or twice to be able to analyse it better. I did a Reddit/EvaGeeks Forum search to find comparisons between the German subs, but couldn’t find any.

chunks.content:
Article: Which ones are the best German subs in your opinion
[]: Which ones are the best German subs in your opinion?             Quote Post by Sertraline » Sat Sep 14, 2024 9:23 am I am currently debating if I should invest in the German DVD set by Leonine to get the official subtitles, because I’ve heard the Netflix version isn’t that accurate. Which are the best German subs in your opinion? Just looking for opinions before I buy anything. I watched the show in Japanese with English subtitles a few times, however, I feel like quite a few things flew over my head, so it would be helpful to watch it in German once or twice to be able to analyse it better. I did a Reddit/EvaGeeks Forum search to find comparisons between the German subs, but couldn’t find any.
